verdict_obj.summary: The PR may be plausible prerequisite infrastructure, but it does not identify the roadmap target it advances, so roadmap fit cannot be checked from the stated scope.

findings.issue: The PR adds `TauCeti.AlgebraicTopology.UniversalCover.Deck` without naming any TauCetiRoadmap file/node or heading that needs deck transformations now.
findings.fix: Update the PR description to cite the specific roadmap file and node/heading, and explain the proximate dependency path from `Deck p` to that target.
findings.evidence: The supplied PR material names only a Mathlib draft (#40135) and describes follow-up covering-map theorems; it gives no roadmap file, node, or heading to verify against.
